subject: [PATCH nfs-utils v2 14/16] exportfs: add netlink support for cache flush with /proc fallback

2026-03-30.patch_summary: This patch adds support for flushing NFS caches using netlink, which is a more modern and efficient method than the original /proc/net/rpc/*/flush write path. The new implementation tries to send SUNRPC_CMD_CACHE_FLUSH and NFSD_CMD_CACHE_FLUSH messages via netlink first, but falls back to the original /proc path if the sunrpc genl family cannot be resolved (which is a problem in older kernels). The patch also moves the cache_flush() function from support/nfs/cacheio.c to a new file support/export/cache_flush.c, which has access to libnl. This change allows for more flexible and efficient caching behavior in NFS exports.
